jobs.title: Email Marketing Specialist
jobs.description:
Revolut is looking for an Email Marketing Specialist to help the team craft compelling campaigns that drive engagement and growth. We are looking for a talented Email Marketing Specialist to join the Revolut team. You'll work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful solutions that shape how millions of users experience our product.

As an Email Marketing Specialist, you will be responsible for driving initiatives from concept through execution. You'll collaborate with product managers, engineers, and other stakeholders to align on priorities and deliver outstanding results.

In this role you will have the opportunity to make a real impact, mentor junior team members, and grow your skills in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
requirements: 3+ years of experience in email marketing or digital marketing
Proficiency with email platforms (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, or similar)
Strong copywriting and communication skills
Experience with A/B testing and campaign optimization
Data-driven mindset with ability to derive insights from analytics
Familiarity with HTML/CSS for email template editing

jobs.title: Brand Designer
jobs.description:
Dropbox is seeking a Brand Designer to shape and evolve the visual identity of one of the world's leading file-sharing platforms. We are looking for a talented Brand Designer to join the Dropbox team. You'll work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful solutions that shape how millions of users experience our product.

As a Brand Designer, you will be responsible for driving initiatives from concept through execution. You'll collaborate with product managers, engineers, and other stakeholders to align on priorities and deliver outstanding results.
requirements: 5+ years of brand design experience
Expert knowledge of Figma and Adobe Creative Suite
Portfolio showcasing strong brand identity work
Experience working with global design systems
Excellent communication and presentation skills
Ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment

Understanding of typography, color, and layout principles

Proficiency in Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, Pulumi)
Experience with Kubernetes and Docker
Strong Linux systems administration background
